Now entering ANZ & APAC markets

The operating layer your TMC has been missing.

Cinturon360 replaces legacy mid-office complexity — bringing modern governance, workflow automation, and finance-grade reporting to travel management companies without forcing you to change how you book.

Works with Amadeus · Sabre · Travelport · Duffel · AirGateway

Built for TMCs Join Waitlist
🏢 TMC-first design 🔗 GDS + NDC native 🌏 APAC-hosted ✅ No rip-and-replace 🚀 Pre-seed stage

ERP / Finance Downstream
How it works

Three layers.
One integrated system.

Connect what you have. Govern what gets booked. See everything, in real time.

🔌
01

Connect to your ecosystem

Cinturon360 integrates with the GDS (Amadeus, Sabre, Travelport), NDC feeds (Duffel, AirGateway), and direct suppliers you already use. No migration. No forced change.

⚙️
02

Apply governance & automation

Configure policy rules, approval chains, and workflow automation for each client. Cinturon360 enforces them at booking — not after the fact, not in email, not in a spreadsheet.

📊
03

Get real-time visibility

Finance teams, travel managers, and TMC account managers get live spend data, compliance reporting, and exception tracking — structured for audit, client review, or board presentation.

Works alongside your existing channels. See all integrations →

Platform capabilities

Governance, automation, and visibility,
built as one system.

Not three bolt-on modules. A single platform where policy, workflow automation, and reporting share the same data model — so what gets approved is what gets reported.

🛡️
Governance

Policy & Approval Workflows

Route bookings to the right approvers before spend is committed. Apply rules by entity, team, traveller, cost centre, destination, or fare cap — with a full defensible audit trail.

  • Pre-trip approvals enforced at booking
  • Configurable approval chains
  • Out-of-policy exception handling
  • Audit-grade decision records
Policy & Approvals
⚙️
Automation

TMC Workflow Automation

Replace manual mid-office processes with automated workflow logic — from client onboarding to booking intake, quality control, and client notifications.

  • Repeatable client onboarding
  • Booking intake automation
  • Mid-office workflow engine
  • Scale without extra headcount
TMC Operations
📊
Visibility

Finance-Grade Reporting

Real-time spend visibility across every booking, approval, and exception — structured for finance teams, client reviews, and board reporting. Not another Excel export.

  • Real-time spend by segment
  • Multi-entity consolidation
  • Compliance & exception reports
  • CFO-ready data exports
Reporting & Visibility
Who we serve

One platform.
Every tier of managed travel.

TMCs run on Cinturon360. Their corporate, government, and leisure clients benefit from it.

🏢
Primary audience

Travel Management Companies

Cinturon360 is built for TMCs first. Replace Tramada and legacy mid-office tools with a modern platform for client management, workflow automation, GDS/NDC integration, and finance-grade reporting.

Tramada replacement Client automation Multi-client scale
For TMCs →
💼
CFOs & Travel Managers

Corporate Travel Programs

Full visibility over every dollar spent on travel. Pre-trip approvals, policy enforcement at booking, and CFO-ready reporting — without changing your TMC relationship or booking channel.

Pre-trip approvals Spend visibility Policy enforcement
For Corporates →
🏛️
Audit-grade governance

Government & Controlled Environments

Structured approvals, defensible audit trails, and compliance reporting for travel programs operating under strict accountability and regulatory requirements.

Defensible records Structured governance Audit trail
For Government →
✈️
Premium programs

Leisure & High-Net-Worth Travel

Precision oversight for premium leisure programs. Governance and visibility tools for travel advisors managing HNW clients who expect discretion, quality, and accountability.

Premium programs HNW clients Advisor tools
For Leisure →
Why now

Legacy tools weren't built
for what comes next.

The industry has patched around the same problem for decades. NDC is forcing a reckoning. Compliance requirements are rising. The window to re-platform is now.

✕
Tramada

On-premise legacy back-office. Built before cloud, before NDC, before modern compliance. Still dominant in ANZ — and still showing its age.

✕
SAP Concur

Enterprise expense platform with travel bolted on. Governance is an afterthought, not a foundation. Built for corporate buyers, not TMC operations.

✕
Serko / Zeno

Corporate booking tools focused on the traveller experience. Doesn't solve the back-office, mid-office, or TMC operations problem.

✕
Crosscheck

Quality control point solution. Useful for one part of the problem — doesn't replace the need for a full operational platform.

Cinturon360 is the platform built for what comes next.

Modern cloud-native architecture. TMC-first design. No rip-and-replace. Works alongside GDS, NDC, and your existing supplier relationships — while replacing the legacy mid-office that's been holding you back.

See what TMCs get → View integrations

Ready to replace legacy with modern?

Cinturon360 is in active development. TMCs and design partners are joining now to shape the platform. Get early access and be first to go live.
